response.global_analysis: The audio features a dialogue section followed by the song 'Hitotsu ni Naru Koe' (Voices becoming one) by Nepolabo. Phonetics match the expected lyrics and dialogue. I am transcribing the dialogue, song title, and lyrics with precise timing synchronized to the vocal audio and on-screen text.

subtitles.original: ねねたち、あんなに練習したのに～っ！
作ったのはいいけど......「出すタイミングどうしよう」って言ってたら、
subtitles.english: It was good that we made it, but while we were wondering when to use it...

subtitles.original: 出すタイミング絶対にここだったな～
subtitles.english: This was definitely the time to use it.

subtitles.original: もうステージ真っ暗だし～～～！
subtitles.english: The stage is already pitch black!

subtitles.original: ......お客さん......まだ、いてくれてる、かな......
subtitles.english: ...I wonder if... the audience is still there...

subtitles.original: ......大丈夫！ 今なら、まだ......ギリギリ間に合うっ！！
subtitles.english: ...It's okay! We can still... just barely make it!!

subtitles.original: ねえ！ そこの君！！ まだ......見てくれているよね？
subtitles.english: Hey! You there!! You're still... watching, right?

subtitles.original: ねねたちの、新しい曲──聴いてくれる？
subtitles.english: Will you listen to... our new song?

subtitles.original: うん、うん......きっと、聴いてくれるって信じてる！
subtitles.english: Yeah, yeah... I'm sure they'll listen to us!

subtitles.original: 最後まで一緒に盛り上がっていこうね！
subtitles.english: Let's all have a blast together until the end!

subtitles.original: それではあらためて......んんっ......聴いてください──ねぽらぼの新曲です
subtitles.english: And now, once again... *ahem*... Please listen to... Nepolabo's new song.

subtitles.original: この先、みんなとなら、どこまでも行けると願って──歌います
subtitles.english: Hoping that we can go anywhere if we're together... we will sing.

subtitles.original: 5周年──その先の未来もずっと、一緒に見守り......歩んでください
subtitles.english: 5th anniversary... Please continue to watch over us and walk with us into the future.

subtitles.original: 1人じゃ辿り着けない場所へ......みんなで──
subtitles.english: To a place we couldn't reach alone... all together--

subtitles.original: 暗闇の中で 見つけた声
subtitles.english: A voice found in the darkness

subtitles.original: そのしるべを 辿りながら
ひとりぼっちだった日
subtitles.english: The days when I was all alone
The days when I couldn't see ahead

subtitles.original: 手のひらの中に また1を足して
subtitles.english: Adding one more into the palm of my hand

subtitles.original: 何度も奇跡を叶えよう
subtitles.english: Let's make miracles happen over and over again

subtitles.original: 僕らの明日を 照らして
同じ夢を駆ける僕らは
subtitles.english: We, who chase the same dream

subtitles.original: 世界の果て どこにでも行けるから
subtitles.english: We can go anywhere, to the ends of the world

subtitles.original: これからまた続いてく道
subtitles.english: On the road that continues from here

subtitles.original: だから この背中預けるよ
subtitles.english: So I'll entrust my back to you
I think it's just like you
Makes me happy for some reason

subtitles.original: きっとこれからもそう
subtitles.english: I'm sure it'll stay that way
Within the palm of my hand
The wish from when it all began

subtitles.original: 未来まで連れてゆこう
subtitles.english: Let's take it with us to the future

subtitles.original: みんなの笑顔 見つけた
同じ夢を駆ける僕らは
subtitles.english: We, who chase the same dream

subtitles.original: 世界の果て どこにでも行けるから
subtitles.english: We can go anywhere, to the ends of the world

subtitles.original: これからまた続いてく道
subtitles.english: On the road that continues from here

subtitles.original: だから この背中預けるよ
subtitles.english: So I'll entrust my back to you
